name: Twisted Tetra
description:
An eel whose body camouflages within the roots that make up the riverbeds of the Harandar. The Twisted Tetra lies in wait for Bloomtail Minnows who become too comfortable with their surroundings.

Special: 

 Fresh Fillet

Salvaging this fish with the Cooking skill can produce Fresh Fillet.

Areas you can find this fish:
- Harandar
- Zul'Aman

Fishing Pools:
- Obscured School
- Lashing Waves
